/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wshadow -Woverloaded-virtual -Wnon-virtual-dtor -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG -O2 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=26.1 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/env_error_injection_test.dir/env_error_injection_test.cc.o -o env_error_injection_test  ../libmwal.a ../lib/libgtest.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libzstd.dylib ../lib/libgtest.a
